title: Ores, Gears & Monsters
description: Ores, Gears & Monsters — A beta modpack centered on Create, Oritech, and Cobblemon: explore new biomes and ruins, document discoveries with Exposure, enjoy Kaleidoscope food, and use built‑in Plasmo Voice. 201 mods.
body:
### Ores, Gears & Monsters
- A curated adventure and creativity modpack centered on **Create**, **Oritech**, and **Cobblemon**, blending engineering, new progression, and creature-collection into one experience.

- Explore dozens of newly added biomes and ancient ruins, and enjoy expanded survival options with the Kaleidoscope food mod. Capture your discoveries using the Exposure camera mod.

- Built-in Plasmo Voice enables seamless in-game voice chat for multiplayer sessions, making cooperative exploration and base-building effortless.

- This modpack is ideal for players who enjoy automation, exploration, and shared adventures. It contains a total of 201 mods.

This modpack include [stay true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

This modpack is not compatible with server hosting.
The server-compatible version's URL: (not yet completed)
